item.description: I am currently a post-doctoral research associate at the The Univeristy of Edinburgh. I am working with Dr. Adam A. Stokes on sensing and data analytics solutions under the ORCA (Offshore Robotics for Certification of Assets) project targeted towards the Oil & Gas industries. My research interest lies at the junction of machine learning, robotics, internet of things, and decenentralisation. Recently, I have picked up applying Transfer Learning and Federated Computing across industrial IoT applications.
